axioms: A cache must pay for itself; an optimization that does not reduce the dominant cost is dead weight
Every read of shared mutable state across processes/coroutines is a race until proven serialized
The fast path is whatever runs on a hit; its real cost is measured, not assumed
State split across stores (index + file) must have a defined coherence/teardown order
failure_mode: treats a stale secret as merely a cache miss
does not reason about who is harmed by serving old data
